entries.title: Astro (.astro) language support
entries.summary: Adds full parsing support for `.astro` files (Astro v6), bringing the language count to 74. Mixed-language components (TypeScript frontmatter, HTML template, `<script>`/`<style>` blocks) follow the existing Razor recursive-delegation strategy. PR #311 by @gokhanozdemir.

entries.title: keyring credentials, metadata-only cache, init --minimal, docstring opt-out, git-SHA verification, sigstore release signing
entries.summary: Six additive enterprise-hardening items in one release. All purely additive; existing user-facing behavior unchanged across every change.

entries.title: explicit telemetry opt-out lever, speedreview Action pinned, docs hardening
entries.summary: Patch release covering three additive enterprise-hardening items.
